scripts.check: npx prisma validate && npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test apps/api/test/*.test.cjs
scripts.test:gameplay: npm run build -w @holdout/shared && npm run build -w @holdout/api && node --test apps/api/test/*.test.cjs
scripts.test:load: npm run build -w @holdout/shared && npm run build -w @holdout/api && node tools/load-test.mjs --clients=100 --seconds=10
scripts.art:generate: npm run build -w @holdout/shared && node tools/gen-sprites.mjs && node tools/gen-production-art.mjs
scripts.art:publish: npm run art:generate && node tools/seed-engine.mjs && node tools/publish-production-art.mjs
scripts.deploy:api: npm --workspace=apps/api run build && npm --workspace=apps/api run deploy
scripts.deploy:web: npm --workspace=apps/web run build && npm --workspace=apps/web run deploy
scripts.deploy:api:ci: npm --workspace=apps/api run build --if-present && echo "Replace this with your CI/CD deploy command (scp/rsync/docker push, etc.)"
scripts.deploy:web:ci: npm --workspace=apps/web run build --if-present && echo "Replace this with your CI/CD deploy command (scp/rsync/docker push, etc.)"
